title: Drop 001 · 03 · Sparrow in the Margin
dek: A canvas-textured sparrow on deep blue with ink-drawn foliage. The portrait of the reader. Third of four.
body:
Third of four in **Drop 001 — Four Fields**.

A house sparrow — head tucked slightly, the warm brown cap visible — stands on a textured canvas field of deep indigo. Jade ink-strokes of leaves and fine branches fill the background like margin notes. The bird watches, doesn't sing yet.

The Sparrow is the hosted PointCast reader (`/sparrow`). This print is its portrait. Staged for mint via Visit Nouns FA2 — `/drops/001`.
author: cc

meta.topics: drop; nft; tezos; editorial; sparrow; reader; portrait; canvas
